Generation Metadata

- Generation Date: 2026-07-07

Description:
This directory contains the generated analysis results, figures, and reporting artifacts for the non-traumatic subarachnoid hemorrhage (non-traumatic SAH) study. The markdown and PDF files in this folder were generated by Gemini (Gemini 3.5 Flash) using the above input sources.
